title: Playground Editor Bar
concept: A modal-free expert toolbar for theme authors that treats Playground work as compact command strips beside the live site: launch routes, save destinations, saved management, Site Manager tools, Blueprint catalog, and transfer commands stay inline with keyboard-like affordances and visible state changes.
focus: warm editorial accents kept secondary to controls
flows: Launch a Playground from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or imported zip with route-specific inputs and constraints.
Save an unsaved Playground to browser storage or a local directory with distinct destination copy, progress, and resulting saved identity.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with resume, rename, delete, and temporary-state consequences visible inline.
Use Site Manager settings, files, Blueprint, database, and logs without opening modal overlays while the active WordPress preview remains usable.
Browse, search, filter, inspect, and run Blueprint gallery entries from a credible 43-entry catalog surface with featured shortcuts represented.
Export to GitHub, download a zip, import a zip over the current site, and start GitHub imports with visible consequence messaging.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
